finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract ethics loops with embodied consequence beats (missed-call reaction, aborted callback, forced alarm-setting, physical handoff of phone, typed-and-deleted outreach). Kept one explicit boundary statement while removing rule-heavy cleanup language in the aftermath span.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_11.md:365; chapters/chapter_11.md:371; chapters/chapter_11.md:393; chapters/chapter_11.md:421; chapters/chapter_11.md:453; chapters/chapter_11.md:461
finding_results.notes: Added multiple pre-voicemail escalation beats (bursar debt warning, failed home contact, wire cutoff/fee math, paycheck triage, proactive text with transfer plan) so family stakes rise before Nora's final voicemail and force Eli into concrete action first.

Shifted Marisol away from interchangeable coaching cadence into sensory/plainspoken pressure tied to work rhythm and bodily immediacy. Removed repetitive 'say it plain / I hear you' looping and moved pressure into action/silence beats.
Retained the designated 'landed hard' motif instance in principle and avoided adding new landed-impact duplicates; nearby impact phrasing was revised to prevent motif overuse.

summary: Chapter 11 now keeps the intimate fallout morally unresolved through concrete action, restores Marisol's distinct idiolect under pressure, and front-loads family-stakes escalation before the closing Nora voicemail while preserving heading contract and continuity handoff into chapter 12.
